title: streptanthus pedicellatus
intro: Streptanthus pedicellatus, also known as the Sierra Clarkia or Pedicellate Streptanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is native to the Sierra Nevada mountains in California and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including colds, sore throats, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Herbal preparations of Streptanthus pedicellatus often involve infusions, decoctions, and salves that can be used topically or taken orally to reap its health benefits.
